ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "day" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each day */,
  "outlook" TEXT /* Describes the weather outlook (e.g., sunny, rainy, overcast) */,
  "temperature" TEXT /* Describes the temperature condition (e.g., hot, mild, cool) */,
  "humidity" TEXT /* Describes the humidity level (e.g., high, normal) */,
  "wind" TEXT /* Describes the wind condition (e.g., Wind, NoWind) */,
  "playability" TEXT /* Suggests whether outdoor activities are advisable (e.g., yes, no) */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Amount of precipitation (e.g., mm) */,
  "uv_index" INTEGER /* UV index, which affects public health and safety */,
  "air_quality_index" INTEGER /* Air quality index, which affects health and event planning */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Exact time when the weather data was recorded */,
  "location" TEXT /* Specific location within the city where the weather data was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("day")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_planning" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "playability" TEXT /* Indicates if the event is playable based on weather conditions */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specific location where the event is planned */,
  "expected_attendees" INTEGER /* Expected number of attendees */,
  "cancellation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for cancellation, if applicable */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the event (e.g., planned, canceled, postponed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_planning_playability FOREIGN KEY ("playability") REFERENCES weather_data ("playability")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the user belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user within the department */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_impact" (
  "impact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each impact record */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Reference to the day with specific weather conditions */,
  "operation_type" TEXT /* Type of city operation affected (e.g., traffic, public events) */,
  "impact_level" TEXT /* Level of impact (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "impact_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the impact */,
  "recommended_actions" TEXT /* Recommended actions to mitigate the impact */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Exact time when the impact was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("impact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_impact_day FOREIGN KEY ("day") REFERENCES weather_data ("day")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast record */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date for which the forecast is made */,
  "predicted_outlook" TEXT /* Predicted weather outlook */,
  "predicted_temp" TEXT /* Predicted temperature condition */,
  "predicted_humidity" TEXT /* Predicted humidity level */,
  "predicted_wind" TEXT /* Predicted wind condition */,
  "predicted_precipitation" REAL /* Predicted amount of precipitation */,
  "predicted_uv_index" INTEGER /* Predicted UV index */,
  "predicted_air_quality_index" INTEGER /* Predicted air quality index */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the forecast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id")
)
